# Boston Tech Scene

> A curated directory of the Boston and Cambridge startup ecosystem — covering communities, events, accelerators, VCs, angel investors, and workspaces for founders and builders.

## Overview

Boston Tech Scene is a resource for founders, builders, and investors navigating the Boston/Cambridge technology and startup ecosystem. It aggregates key organizations, programs, and spaces across the region to help people plug into the local scene.

## Communities

- **MA AI Coalition** — Statewide coalition accelerating AI innovation and policy in Massachusetts. https://massaicoalition.com
- **Cambridge Founders Club** — Community for founders based in and around Cambridge. https://www.cambridgefounders.club/
- **Build 617** — Boston's community for builders, makers, and technical founders. https://www.linkedin.com/company/build617/
- **Startup Boston** — Curated directory of Boston startup events, communities, and resources. https://www.startupbos.org/
- **Sundai Club** — MIT and Harvard-affiliated community building AI prototypes every Sunday. https://www.sundai.club/
- **Boston New Technology** — Largest tech meetup in Boston with 10,000+ members. https://www.meetup.com/boston_new_technology/

## Events

- **Markit** — Curated text list of Boston startup events delivered to your phone. https://markitai.com
- **Startup Boston** — Curated directory of Boston startup events. https://www.startupbos.org/directory/events
- **Luma** — Go-to calendar for Boston tech events. https://lu.ma/boston

## Accelerators & Programs

- **The Engine** — MIT's tough tech venture fund and accelerator for hard science and engineering breakthroughs. https://engine.xyz
- **MassChallenge** — World's largest startup accelerator, zero equity taken, Boston cohort runs annually. https://masschallenge.org/programs-boston
- **Techstars Boston** — 3-month accelerator offering $120K investment and global network access. https://techstars.com/accelerators/boston
- **Greentown Labs Incubator** — North America's largest climatetech incubator with lab space and expert programming. https://greentownlabs.com/incubator
- **MassRobotics Startup Program** — World-class robotics R&D space and prototyping equipment for robotics startups. https://massrobotics.org/membership

## Venture Capital Firms

### Seed Stage
- **E14 Fund** — MIT Media Lab's venture fund for transformative deep tech. https://www.e14.vc
- **First Star** — Pre-seed and seed investor for earliest-stage founders. https://firststar.vc
- **Founder Collective** — Seed-stage fund founded by entrepreneurs, for entrepreneurs. https://foundercollective.com
- **Nextview Ventures** — Seed-stage VC focused on the everyday economy. https://nextview.vc

### Seed / Series A
- **Pillar VC** — Community-first early-stage VC investing in and building the Boston ecosystem. https://pillar.vc
- **Underscore VC** — Community-powered VC investing in early-stage software companies. https://underscore.vc

### Early Stage
- **Flybridge Capital Partners** — Early-stage generalist VC with deep Boston roots. https://flybridge.com
- **Glasswing Ventures** — AI and frontier tech VC at the intersection of AI, security, and enterprise. https://glasswing.vc
- **Hyperplane** — Early-stage VC investing in AI-native companies. https://hyperplane.vc
- **Link Ventures** — Boston-based VC in early-stage technology companies. https://linkventures.com

### Multi-Stage
- **Alumni Ventures** — One of the most active VC firms in the US. https://www.av.vc
- **Matrix** — Multi-stage venture firm backing enterprise software and consumer companies. https://matrixpartners.com

## Notable Angel Investors

Angus Davis, Bob Mason, Dan Slagen, David Cancel, Dharmesh Shah (HubSpot co-founder), Eric Paley (Founder Collective), Jay Batson (Acquia co-founder), Maia Heymann, Michael Skok, Ryan Moore (Underscore VC), Semyon Dukach (One Way Ventures), Wendy Lea.

## Workspaces

### Kendall Square / Cambridge
- **Cambridge Innovation Center (CIC)** — Hub of the Boston startup world, 100K+ sqft in Kendall Square. https://cic.us/cambridge
- **LabCentral** — Premier shared lab space for life science and biotech startups adjacent to MIT. https://labcentral.org
- **The Engine** — MIT tough tech space with specialized lab facilities. https://engine.xyz
- **WeWork Cambridge** — Flexible coworking and private offices in Kendall Square. https://wework.com
- **Venture Café Cambridge** — Free Thursday-evening coworking and networking at CIC. https://venturecafecambridge.org

### Seaport / South Boston
- **MassRobotics** — World-leading robotics hub with 60,000+ sqft of R&D space. https://massrobotics.org
- **Greentown Labs** — North America's largest climatetech incubator with wet lab and maker space. https://greentownlabs.com
- **District Hall** — Boston's free public innovation space. https://districthallboston.org
- **Workbar Seaport** — Local coworking chain in the Seaport Innovation District. https://workbar.com

### Back Bay
- **Workbar Back Bay** — Flagship Boston coworking with premium amenities. https://workbar.com/locations/back-bay
- **Harvard Innovation Labs** — Harvard's pan-university hub in Allston for Harvard-affiliated founders. https://innovationlabs.harvard.edu
- **BU Spark! / BUild Lab** — Boston University's innovation space on Commonwealth Ave. https://bu.edu/spark

### Somerville & Downtown
- **Workbar Somerville** — Coworking hub in Union Square. https://workbar.com/locations/somerville
- **CIC Boston (Downtown)** — CIC's Downtown Boston flexible coworking location. https://cic.us/boston
